headline: Princess Cruises Announces Largest- Ever Europe Season for 2028
summary: Princess Cruises unveils its most expansive Europe season for 2028, with 291 departures across 150 unique itineraries aboard six ships sailing throughout Northern Europe, the Mediterranean and on Transatlantic voyages.

raw.headline: Princess Cruises Announces Largest- Ever Europe Season for 2028
raw.summary: Princess Cruises unveils its most expansive Europe season for 2028, with 291 departures across 150 unique itineraries aboard six ships sailing throughout Northern Europe, the Mediterranean and on Transatlantic voyages.

headline: Carnival’s LNG Fuel Breakthrough And What It Could Mean For CCL Investors
summary: Carnival Corporation (NYSE:CCL) completed the first LNG bunker fueling operation in Latin America and the Western Caribbean. The company used a mobile LNG bunkering setup to supply one of its cruise ships as part of its decarbonization efforts. This operation supports Carnival’s broader plan to build out cleaner fuel infrastructure in a key global cruise region. Carnival runs a global cruise business, so access to reliable fuel infrastructure is central to how its ships operate day to day...
